summary: Review #5 addresses external reviewer feedback (review #4): (1) plugins.go now guards against Config map overwriting the FilterFactory-set paste.filter_factory key, (2) PipelinePosition godoc comments clarified to describe positioning relative to base filters and terminal app, (3) test added for the paste.filter_factory override guard. All 3 changes are minimal, correct, and well-tested.

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages

verification.go_vet: PASS — 0 issues on types/ and plugins/
verification.golangci_lint: PASS — 0 issues on types/ and plugins/

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (empty inputs, nil maps, boundary positions, duplicates)
New test case covers paste.filter_factory override guard
Coverage meets 80%+ target (97.7% plugins, 100% conditions, 100% config, 97.5% policy)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (gomega dot-import, table-driven tests, license headers)
Functions are focused and small (≤40 lines)
No dead code or commented-out code

security_checklist.item: All functions are pure — no Kubernetes API calls, no I/O

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Changes are minimal and scoped to the review feedback
No scope creep beyond the external reviewer's feedback

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early (duplicate middleware returns error before rendering)
FilterFactory takes precedence over Config key — fail-safe design

defensive_checklist.item: paste.filter_factory in Config map silently skipped rather than overwriting FilterFactory
Unknown position values silently skipped with comment

review_walkthrough.1_INTENT: External reviewer (greptile-apps[bot]) flagged: (a) Config map could overwrite paste.filter_factory set by FilterFactory field, (b) PipelinePosition godoc was unclear about positioning semantics.
review_walkthrough.2_SCOPE: 3 files changed — plugins.go (3-line guard), plugins_test.go (20-line test case), types.go (3-line godoc edit). Strictly scoped to feedback.
review_walkthrough.3_VERIFICATION: go vet PASS, golangci-lint 0 issues, go test all pass, coverage 97.7%+ across all packages.
review_walkthrough.4_PATTERNS: Follows existing table-driven test pattern with gomega dot-import and NewGomegaWithT(t). License headers and Feature: CC-0004 present.
review_walkthrough.5_TESTS: New test case verifies FilterFactory field takes precedence when Config contains paste.filter_factory key. Asserts both the correct factory value and that extra config keys are preserved.
review_walkthrough.6_SECURITY: Pure functions only. No external input, no I/O, no injection surface.
review_walkthrough.7_COMPLEXITY: 3-line if-continue guard is the simplest correct solution for preventing Config map override.
review_walkthrough.8_COMPLETENESS: All feedback items addressed. No stubs or TODOs.
